_format: Map of participant label (lowercase first name, must match the part between 'experiment_' and the date in the CSV filename) to attribute fields used by aggregate_analysis.py for cross-participant correlations. Add an entry every time a new session is recorded.

_field_schema.anxiety: 1 = low, 2 = moderate, 3 = high (rough estimate from interview)
_field_schema.notes: free text — relevant medical history, motor history, anything worth flagging
